dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5910 RH: To authorize leases of up to 99 years for land held in trust for federally recognized Indian Tribes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Hageman (for herself and Ms. Leger Fernandez) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources
Additional sponsors: Mr. Hurd of Colorado, Mr. LaMalfa, and Ms. Ansari
Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed

form.official-title: To authorize leases of up to 99 years for land held in trust for federally recognized Indian Tribes.

section.text: Subsection (a) of the first section of the Act of August 9, 1955 (69 Stat. 539, chapter 615; 25 U.S.C. 415(a)), is amended, in the second sentence, by inserting , land held in trust for any other Indian Tribe included on the list published by the Secretary pursuant to section 104 of the Federally Recognized Indian Tribe List Act of 1994 (25 U.S.C. 5131) after Chehalis Reservation.

endorsement.action-desc: Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed
